_notes: Canonical quest registry. Read by engine/quest-registry.js via synchronous XHR at boot. Per-floor sidequests can also live in tools/floor-payloads/<floorId>.quest.json and are merged in by tools/extract-floors.js before serving.

sidequest.title: quest.sidequest.<slug>.title
sidequest.notes: Copy this block, replace <slug> with a snake_case id, fill giver + target floor + step predicates. Title/hook/summary strings go in data/strings/en.js under the matching key. `markerColor` overrides the default minimap quest marker color (HUD settings toggle still gates visibility).

main.title: quest.main.<slug>.title
main.notes: Main-quest spine — one per Act beat. Gated by flags + readiness tier.

faction.title: quest.faction.<faction>.<tier>.title
faction.notes: Per-faction reputation-advancement chain. `factionId` must be one of QuestTypes.FACTIONS (mss, pinkerton, jesuit, bprd).

_anchorNotes: Named anchors. Resolved by QuestRegistry.resolveAnchor(id). Spec shapes: { type:'literal',floorId,x,y } | { type:'floor-data',floorId,path } | { type:'entity',module,method,floorId? } | { type:'npc',floorId,npcId } | { type:'dump-truck',floorId? } | { type:'door-to',floorId,targetFloorId }. Floor-data/dump-truck with no floorId are resolver templates that must be supplied per-call by quests.json step targets (which embed the floorId).
